              generic "Complete: { \"content\": \"In the context of SPARTA technique REC-0003.01 (Communications Equipment), controls CM0001 (Protect Sensitive Information) and CM0029 (TRANSEC) both mitigate the threat but address different aspects. CM0001 focuses on protecting sensitive information about communications equipment (e.g., antenna configuration, beacon frequencies) through classification and access control, preventing adversaries from gathering and exploiting that information. CM0029 focuses on protecting the transmission itself via jam-resistant waveforms and encryption of signal parameters to prevent interception, disruption, and analysis of signals. As evidenced by the Primary QRA, CM0001 reduces exposure of technical details that could aid an adversary, while CM0029 secures the communication channel against exploitation. They are complementary controls that together provide defense-in-depth against the gathering and exploitation of communications equipment information.\", \"citations\": [\"REC-0003.01\", \"CM0001\", \"CM0029\"], \"confidence\": \"high\", \"caveats\": [\"The evidence does not explicitly describe the relationship between CM0001 and CM0029; their complementary nature is inferred from their individual mitigations of the same technique.\"] }" [e138] [cursor=pointer]
